=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

[D1] (8:3-8:8) TS377019: This `yield* Effect.fail(...)` passes a yieldable error value. `yield*` represents that value directly without wrapping it in `Effect.fail`. effect(unnecessaryFailYieldableError)
  Fix 0: "Disable unnecessaryFailYieldableError for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable unnecessaryFailYieldableError for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Replace yield* Effect.fail with yield*"

=== Quick Fix Application Results ===

=== [D1] Fix 0: "Disable unnecessaryFailYieldableError for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 1: "Disable unnecessaryFailYieldableError for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 2: "Replace yield* Effect.fail with yield*" ===

--- file:///.src/unnecessaryFailYieldableError_preview.ts ---
// @effect-diagnostics *:off
// @effect-diagnostics unnecessaryFailYieldableError:warning
import * as Data from "effect/Data"
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

class Boom extends Data.TaggedError("Boom")<{}> {}
export const preview = Effect.gen(function*() {
  yield*new Boom()
})
